blurb: Season 4 arena gear for Restoration Druid: the Brutal Gladiator's set (Brutal Gladiator's Kodohide Helm, Brutal Gladiator's Wyrmhide Spaulders, Brutal Gladiator's Kodohide Tunic…), backed by Guardian's offset pieces from the honor vendor. Season 4 has the strictest gates in TBC: the Brutal weapon requires 1950 rating, shoulders 2200, and several pieces check personal rating as well as team rating. The slot-by-slot list below translates what the current arena ladder's top Restoration Druids equip into their Season 4 equivalents — same slot logic, this season's items.

bis.name: Stainless Cloak of the Pure Hearted

faq.question: What is the Season 4 arena set for Restoration Druid?
faq.answer: The Brutal Gladiator's pieces: Brutal Gladiator's Kodohide Helm, Brutal Gladiator's Wyrmhide Spaulders, Brutal Gladiator's Kodohide Tunic, Brutal Gladiator's Wyrmhide Gloves, Brutal Gladiator's Kodohide Legguards, Brutal Gladiator's Salvation, Brutal Gladiator's Reprieve. The 2-piece and 4-piece set bonuses carry over between seasons, so partial upgrades never break your bonus.

faq.question: What are the rating requirements in Season 4?
faq.answer: Season 4 has the strictest gates in TBC: the Brutal weapon requires 1950 rating, shoulders 2200, and several pieces check personal rating as well as team rating.

faq.question: How many arena points does full Season 4 gear cost?
faq.answer: The five set pieces total roughly 8,250 arena points (helm/chest/legs 1,875 each, shoulders 1,500, gloves 1,125) plus about 3,750 for a main weapon. Use the arena points calculator to turn your weekly rating into a purchase timeline.

faq.question: Which honor pieces complement the Season 4 set?
faq.answer: Guardian's Pendant of Salvation, Guardian's Kodohide Bracers, Guardian's Kodohide Belt, Guardian's Kodohide Boots, Guardian's Band of Salvation — bought with honor and battleground marks, no arena rating needed.
